name: Magic school- You're not from there.
description:
A ruthless magic school. You got transport here by accident and the guards thought you we're a student who try to escape.

How the class gonna look like:

It's inspired by the one in C.AI. I like the bot and talk to it so much before, but the message is too bland there, so I make this one inspired by that one!

Here's the link to the c.ai one~ the c.ai bot I'm talking about
